C

calculateChecksum(String, String) - Method in class cloudpage.service.FileService
Computes the SHA-256 checksum of a file, confined to the user's root directory.
CHECKSUM_ALGORITHM - Static variable in class cloudpage.service.FileService
Algorithm used for file integrity checksums.
ChecksumDto - Class in cloudpage.dto
Integrity metadata for a stored file.
ChecksumDto() - Constructor for class cloudpage.dto.ChecksumDto
 
ClamAvVirusScanner - Class in cloudpage.scan
VirusScanner backed by a ClamAV clamd daemon using the INSTREAM command.

clean() - Static method in record class cloudpage.scan.VirusScanner.ScanResult
 
CLEAN - Enum constant in enum class cloudpage.scan.ScanVerdict
The file was scanned and no threat was found.

ERROR - Enum constant in enum class cloudpage.scan.ScanVerdict
The file could not be scanned (scanner unavailable, I/O error, etc.).
evictExpiredJobs() - Method in class cloudpage.scan.VirusScanService
Periodically drops finished (completed or failed) jobs older than the configured retention so the in-memory job map does not grow without bound on a long-lived instance.

Service for file-level operations within a user's storage area: uploading, deleting, renaming or moving, reading content, and loading files as downloadable resources.

purge(String, String, String) - Method in class cloudpage.service.TrashService
Permanently removes a single file from the user's trash.
purgeExpired() - Method in class cloudpage.service.TrashService
Permanently removes every trashed file whose retention period has elapsed.

R

RateLimitCategory - Enum Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
Classes of file operations that each carry an independent rate-limit budget.
RateLimitDecision - Record Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
Outcome of a single rate-limit check.
RateLimitDecision(boolean, long, long) - Constructor for record class cloudpage.ratelimit.RateLimitDecision
Creates an instance of a RateLimitDecision record class.
RateLimitFilter - Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
Applies per-user / per-IP (and optional instance-wide) rate limits to the file upload, download and listing endpoints.
RateLimitFilter(RateLimitService, RateLimitProperties) - Constructor for class cloudpage.ratelimit.RateLimitFilter
 
RateLimitProperties - Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
Configuration for RateLimitFilter, bound from cloudpage.rate-limit.* (and therefore overridable via environment variables, e.g.
RateLimitProperties() - Constructor for class cloudpage.ratelimit.RateLimitProperties
 
RateLimitProperties.Policy - Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
A token-bucket policy: capacity tokens, fully refilled every refillPeriod.
RateLimitProperties.Tier - Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
A set of per-category policies.
RateLimitService - Class in cloudpage.ratelimit
Resolves and evaluates the token buckets that back RateLimitFilter.
RateLimitService(RateLimitProperties, Optional<MeterRegistry>) - Constructor for class cloudpage.ratelimit.RateLimitService
 
readFileContent(String, String) - Method in class cloudpage.service.FileService
Reads the entire textual content of a file.
recordResult(FileScanResult) - Method in class cloudpage.scan.ScanJob
 
remainingTokens() - Method in record class cloudpage.ratelimit.RateLimitDecision
Returns the value of the remainingTokens record component.

renameOrMoveFolder(String, String, String) - Method in class cloudpage.service.FolderService

restore(String, String, String) - Method in class cloudpage.service.TrashService

scan(Path) - Method in class cloudpage.scan.ClamAvVirusScanner
 
scan(Path) - Method in interface cloudpage.scan.VirusScanner
Scans a single file.
ScanJob - Class in cloudpage.scan
Mutable state of a single asynchronous folder scan, owned by one user.
ScanJob(String, String, String, Instant) - Constructor for class cloudpage.scan.ScanJob
 
ScanJobDto - Class in cloudpage.dto
API view of an asynchronous folder scan job: status, metadata, and any threats found.

ScanResult(ScanVerdict, String) - Constructor for record class cloudpage.scan.VirusScanner.ScanResult
Creates an instance of a ScanResult record class.
ScanStatus - Enum Class in cloudpage.scan
Lifecycle state of an asynchronous folder scan job.
ScanVerdict - Enum Class in cloudpage.scan
Outcome of scanning a single file.

Optional metadata filters and sort controls for the folder search endpoint.

searchInFolder(String, String, String, int, int) - Method in class cloudpage.service.FolderService
Searches for files and folders within a given folder using the Jaro-Winkler similarity algorithm.

Name of the per-user trash directory, relative to the user's root.

Wires the virus-scan configuration properties and the background executor that runs scans.

Endpoints for asynchronously scanning a user's folder for viruses.

VirusScanner - Interface in cloudpage.scan
Abstraction over a virus-scanning engine.
VirusScanner.ScanResult - Record Class in cloudpage.scan
Verdict for a single file, with an optional threat name when infected.
VirusScanProperties - Class in cloudpage.scan
Configuration for the folder virus-scan feature.

Runs asynchronous virus scans over a user's folder.
